name: Ingentec Corporation
summary: Ingentec Corporation manufactures and supplies fine chemicals and high pressure gas containers to semiconductor front end, semiconductor package, and flat panel display processes. The company offers laser gas; silicon wafer related products, such as quartz crucibles, and polished and reclaim wafers; and specialty gas and wet chemical related products, including PSA argon gas recovery and purification systems, specialty gas, and texturing chemical. It also offers special materials and tools comprising chillers, LED metal clad substrates, mass flow meters and controllers, pigment, sputtering target materials, and thermal spray coatings powder; and solar cell related products, such as platelet calcined alumina, laser machine for PERC and boron dope, SiC powder, slurry recycle systems, solar quartz crucibles, and tungsten seed cables. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Zhunan, Taiwan.
